data.content: Planning complete. Implement central agentRuntime settings with defaults codex speed fast, codex reasoning high, claude reasoning high; validate Codex effort low/medium/high/xhigh and Claude effort low/medium/high/xhigh/max; map Codex speed to service_tier=fast and reasoning to model_reasoning_effort; map Claude reasoning to --effort; do not add Claude speed and do not change label/identity normalization. Primary files: src/lib/schemas.ts, settings partial/merge files, a new runtime-settings helper, src/lib/agent-adapter.ts, dispatch target wrapping paths, docs/SETTINGS.md, and focused adapter/settings/dispatch tests. No child knots required.
